summary: Dexter template testing complete. New 'Dexter' template (id:8) with colorful waves (green/yellow/blue SVG) working correctly. All 9 test cases PASSED.

issues: Console hydration warnings: '<tr> cannot be child of <span>', '<span> cannot be child of <tbody>' - This is due to React rendering the .map() iteration wrapper. Does not affect functionality but should be addressed for cleaner console output.

critical_code_review_comments: InvoiceTemplateDexter.jsx renders correctly with all expected features: colorful SVG waves on both sides, FACTURAR A and ENVIAR A sections, items table with proper columns, totals calculation, and signature area
Template type 'dexter' is properly detected in InvoicePreview.jsx (line 16-17) to render the specialized component
mockTemplates in invoiceData.js correctly defines Dexter with id:8, type:'dexter', and proper thumbnail URL
Minor: Consider wrapping table row iteration differently to avoid React hydration warnings about invalid HTML nesting
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dexter template (id:8, type:'dexter') fully tested and working. Template shows colorful waves design (green #7CB342, yellow #FDD835, blue #4FC3F7) on both sides. Company and client data properly displayed in FACTURAR A and ENVIAR A sections. PDF download functionality works from dashboard.

test_7_item_entry.description: Added item with description, quantity (3) and price (150,000). Monto calculated as 450,000.00

test_8_totals_calculation.description: Subtotal: 450,000.00 and TOTAL: 450,000.00 $ correctly calculated and displayed in preview

test_9_pdf_download.description: PDF download successful from dashboard - downloaded COT-703_FABIAN GUZMAN.pdf with success toast notification
